data.title: THIRD PARTY INSPECTION FOR ELECTRICAL INSTALLATION, TESTING, CERTIFYING TO FULFILL TRAKHEES GUIDELINES FOR EHS GREEN BUILDING SUSTAINABILITY
data.metaTitle: THIRD PARTY INSPECTION FOR ELECTRICAL INSTALLATION, TESTING, CERTIFYING TO FULFILL TRAKHEES GUIDELINES FOR EHS GREEN BUILDING SUSTAINABILITY | Carelabs UAE
data.metaDescription: Carelabs Inspect, Test & Certify Complete Electrical Installation for Safety & Standards fulfilling Trakhees norms for EHS Green Building Sustainability.
data.excerpt: Carelabs Inspect, Test & Certify Complete Electrical Installation for Safety & Standards fulfilling Trakhees norms for EHS Green Building Sustainability.
data.body:
![](https://carelabz.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/Jafza-ad-Oct-2017jpg.jpg) 

Carelabs is authorized provider of Electrical Installation’s Study, Analysis, Inspection, and Certification services in UAE, and offer third party electrical inspection service.TRAKHEES** Environment, Health and Safety (EHS) Regulatory norms **requires their Building Owners and Occupants** to confirm the Integrity of electrical installation that make up all areas of the workshops and offices, and carry out a detailed electrical survey with reports.

Carelabs is well aware with Trakhees Environment, Health and Safety (EHS) aim to promote a sustainable framework that stimulates health and well-being of the stakeholders and their businesses while still being sensitive to the business development and environmental needs. We ensure to fulfill all rules and regulations that Trakhees require for all electrical installation.

## **Carelabs Electrical Consultation & Execution Expertise**

Carelabs Inspect, Test & Certify complete Electrical Installation for Safety & Standards fulfilling TRAKHEES GUIDELINES for EHS GREEN BUILDING sustainability.

- Electrical Audit for Risk assessment
- Third Party Inspection, Testing, & Certification for Electrical Installation
- Visual & Thermography Inspection
- Electrical Safety Test
- Building Envelope
- Thermography Testing
- Electrical Switchgear Testing & Certification
- Protective Devices Testing – Primary & Secondary Injection Test
- Short Circuit Analysis
- Relay Co-ordination Study
- Load Flow Analysis
- Power Quality Study
- Harmonic Analysis
- Energy Auditing
- Arc Flash Hazard Assessment
- Arc Flash Study & Analysis
- Portable Appliance Test
- Electrical Safety Test of Biomedical Equipment’s
- Earth Bonding & Grounding Tests
- Protection down conductors and Air-terminals
- Servicing of Circuit Breaker
- Load Test for Generator, UPS
- Tripping Test and Calibration of Circuit Breakers
- Emergency Light Maintenance
- Battery Test & Maintenance
- All Electrical Testing Services

## **Fulfilling Electrical Compliance**

- Test Standards are informed at the quote level and followed accordingly through the Job.
- Method statements & Risk assessments are taken very seriously for which the client approval is mandatory.
- Immediate hazards are communicated well in advance to ensure safety.
- Report & date stamped photographs of the inspection & tests undertaken clearly tabulating the identified inconsistencies /non conformities shall be provided.
- Report of corrective actions undertaken to rectify the defects shall be provided. Visual & Thermal imaging shall be provided to demonstrate compliance (before and after rectification).
- Copy of the contract with the specialist, providing a definitive time frame for completing all the sub elements shall be provided.
- Our engineer will check the electrical installation against the requirements of Local or International Standards – Requirements for Electrical Installations (IEE Wiring Regulations) and report on the condition of your installation with any remedial recommendations.
- Our electrical engineers will repair & rectify your electrical installation safely and ensuring that your system once again meets standards.

## **Benefits of Electrical Safety Compliance**

- Fulfill Trakhees Environment, Health and Safety (EHS) Regulatory regulatory norms.
- Promote electrical safety in workplace environments.
- Recognize and provide evidence of competence as related to the NFPA 70E & NFPA 70B Standard for Electrical Safety in the Workplace.
- Audit help identify and correct regulatory deficiencies, which, in turn, can improve workplace safety and help reduce liability.
- Improves the building occupant comfort and health.
- Improves building system integration and reduces building energy, thereby reducing operating expenses over the life of the building.
- Encourages higher and greener achievements for faster payback of initial investment costs.
- Increases the real estate value and image of the building.
- Demonstrates strong commitment to green practices.
- Stimulates the local economy.
- Improves the local environment.
- Entices other building owners to also build green.
